title: Archeological
description: Vanilla + expansion to the archeology  experience🏺
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddabb1accbf2b9bd550eb754a679b8f7b05d52ac.png)
![Marco](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aacd8fec8a6fd6fd48ec9ed85525384382c8ac02.png)
# 📖 About:
**Archeological** is a vanilla + style expansion to archeology, offering a more entertaining and dynamic experience to your explorations, with new items, decorative blocks and new structures.

Use the new **Archeology table** to duplicate pottery templates, get items from ancient **Remains**, find **Petroglyphs** in the underground, **Statues** with different expressions, **Dark urns** in the depths, **Idols** of different mobs, get effects with **Runestones** and many **new ruins** across the Overworld!. 

![Marco](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aacd8fec8a6fd6fd48ec9ed85525384382c8ac02.png)

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ab06ae85f53f309ab52cef03272b1c43486ec06.png)

![Marco](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aacd8fec8a6fd6fd48ec9ed85525384382c8ac02.png)

- ⚠️ It can be included in modpacks, but please add credits!
- 📋 If you want to support me I recommend you follow me on [Twitter](https://x.com/thetrulysmods)
